assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with a table listing both 'trustify-backend' (serena_backend) and 'trustify-ui' (serena_ui) as entries
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 19-23 contain '## Repository Registry' with a table. Row 1: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |'. Row 2: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |'. Both repositories with their Serena instances are present.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 26-31 contain '## Jira Configuration' with all 5 fields: 'Project key: TC', 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 33 contains '## Code Intelligence'. Line 35 documents the naming convention: 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' Lines 40-44 provide a concrete example: 'mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol(...)'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 46 contains '### Limitations' which appears under the '## Code Intelligence' section (line 33). Line 48: 'No limitations known — no Serena instances have reported issues.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 16: 'Discovered 2 Serena instances by identifying tools matching the pattern `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`:'. The table on lines 20-21 lists serena_backend and serena_ui with their respective tools. Line 14 confirms the source: 'Source: MCP tool listing (`mcp-tools-with-serena.md`)'

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all sections were newly added (no preserved entries since this is a greenfield setup)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md line 5: 'The existing CLAUDE.md had no `# Project Configuration` section. The entire section was generated and appended to the end of the file.' Lines 19-45 show all configuration sections marked as '(new section)' or '(new subsection)': '# Project Configuration (new section)', '## Repository Registry (new subsection)', '## Jira Configuration (new subsection)', '## Code Intelligence (new subsection)'. Line 49: 'No existing content was removed or overwritten.'

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path — matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 20: '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |'. These four columns exactly match the expected structure. The separator line and data rows follow the same column layout.
